steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is positioned after the noun “reactions” and before the prepositional phrase “within molecules.” This is a post-nominal position.

steps.title: Apply the participle rule
steps.content: A participle (not a finite verb) modifies a noun in post-nominal position. The present participle “occurring” modifies “reactions,” creating the meaning “reactions occurring within molecules.” The other three options—occurred, occur, and will occur—are all finite verb forms that violate this rule. This matches choice B — B is correct.
